title: Collect physical addresses
excerpt: Learn how to collect billing and shipping addresses. This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case: - [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/collect-addresses.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted) - [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/collect-addresses.md?payment-ui=embedded-page) - [Embedded form](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/collect-addresses.md?payment-ui=checkout-form)
